sentence_segments.text: In an N-bit flash ADC, the analog voltage is fed simultaneously to \(2^N - 1\) comparators.

The input must settle to an accuracy of 1/2 LSB even for a full-scale input change for proper conversion.
Assume that the time taken by the thermometer-to-binary encoder is negligible.
If the flash ADC has 8-bit resolution, which one of the following alternatives is closest to the maximum sampling rate?
